---
title: "CV"
page-layout: article
---

::: {.prose-content}

## Cole Rehbein

Crisis Counselor & Psychology Researcher  
Albuquerque, New Mexico

---

### Download

**[Download CV (PDF)](/CV.pdf)** — Full academic and clinical CV

---

### Summary

**Clinical:** Crisis intervention at 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline. ACT, behavioral activation, functional analysis of verbal behavior. Spanish (B1).

**Research:** Master's thesis on outdoor mindfulness-based behavioral activation for depression. Longitudinal design, psychometric analysis.

**Background:** St. John's College (philosophy), journalism, clinical psychology.

---

### Contact

cole@cole.press  
[GitHub](https://github.com/colerehbein)

:::
